name: Bridal
subtitle: Jewellery for the bride of your dreams
description: The wedding day deserves nothing less than perfection. Our bridal collection brings together the finest Polki, Kundan, and antique gold jewellery — crafted to make you feel like royalty on the most important day of your life.
styling_tips: Layer your necklace with a choker for a full bridal look. Pair a grand matha pati with minimal earrings if your necklace is heavy. Complete with a matching hath panja.
meta_description: Shop bridal jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Complete bridal sets, chokers, matha pati, hath panja and more.

name: Reception
subtitle: Shine at your wedding reception
description: The reception calls for glamour and elegance. Choose from our statement necklace sets, grand chandbalis, and contemporary designs that photograph beautifully under evening lights.
styling_tips: Go for bold statement pieces at the reception. A grand choker or long set paired with statement earrings creates a showstopping look. Keep wrist jewellery minimal if your necklace is heavy.
meta_description: Shop reception jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Statement necklaces, earrings, and sets for your wedding reception.

name: Mehendi
subtitle: Colourful jewellery for the mehendi celebration
description: The mehendi ceremony is all about colour, joy, and playful elegance. Our mehendi jewellery collection features vibrant multi-coloured pieces, delicate floral designs, and lightweight sets perfect for dancing and fun.
styling_tips: Opt for colourful multi-stone jewellery for the mehendi. Floral motifs and lighter pieces work beautifully. Pair with bangles in complementary colours.
meta_description: Shop mehendi jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Colourful jewellery sets for the mehendi ceremony.

name: Sangeet
subtitle: Dance the night away in style
description: The sangeet is your night to be bold and expressive. Our sangeet collection features statement pieces that move beautifully — from cascading chandbalis to layered necklaces and vibrant colour-play.
styling_tips: Choose jewellery that moves with you for the sangeet. Jhumkas and long earrings add drama on the dance floor. Go for lightweight options that are comfortable for hours of dancing.
meta_description: Shop sangeet jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Statement and dance-friendly jewellery for the sangeet ceremony.

name: Festive
subtitle: Celebrate every festival in jewellery you love
description: From Diwali and Navratri to Eid and Christmas — our festive jewellery collection has designs for every celebration. Rich antique gold, vibrant Kundan, and classic temple jewellery bring the spirit of every festival alive.
styling_tips: For Diwali, classic gold jewellery never fails. For Navratri, go colourful with Kundan and multi-stone pieces. Match your jewellery colour to your outfit for a put-together festive look.
meta_description: Shop festive jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Diwali jewellery, Navratri jewellery, and festive sets in antique gold and Kundan.

name: Party Wear
subtitle: Jewellery that turns heads at every party
description: Whether it is a cocktail party, a family gathering, or a night out — our party wear jewellery collection offers contemporary statement pieces that work with both Indian and Western outfits.
styling_tips: Pair a statement ear cuff or bold earrings with a simple outfit for instant glam. Mix modern pendant sets with western attire. Less is more — choose one hero piece and keep the rest minimal.
meta_title: Party Wear Jewellery | Ria Art Jewellery
meta_description: Shop party wear jewellery at Ria Art Jewellery Mumbai. Contemporary and statement jewellery for parties, cocktails, and gatherings.
